project.name: Project Atlas
project.summary: Project Atlas is a comprehensive platform modernization initiative to migrate core services to a cloud-native architecture. The project is currently on track with key infrastructure milestones completed and API development progressing well.

shipped.title: Kubernetes Cluster Provisioning
shipped.description: Provisioned and configured production-grade Kubernetes clusters across three availability zones with auto-scaling policies.

shipped.title: CI/CD Pipeline v2
shipped.description: Migrated build and deployment pipelines to GitHub Actions with automated testing, security scanning, and staged rollouts.

shipped.title: Identity Service Rewrite
shipped.description: Rewrote the identity and authentication service using OAuth 2.0 / OIDC standards with support for MFA and SSO.

inProgress.title: Order Management API
inProgress.description: Building RESTful APIs for order lifecycle management including creation, fulfillment, and returns processing.

inProgress.title: Event-Driven Messaging
inProgress.description: Implementing async event bus using Azure Service Bus for decoupled inter-service communication.

inProgress.title: Dashboard Analytics Module
inProgress.description: Developing real-time analytics dashboard for operational metrics and KPI tracking.

carriedOver.title: Legacy Database Decommission Plan
carriedOver.description: Formal decommission plan for the legacy Oracle database including data archival and rollback procedures.
carriedOver.carryOverReason: Blocked by pending legal review of data retention requirements; expected resolution by end of Q2.

carriedOver.title: Performance Benchmark Suite
carriedOver.description: Comprehensive load testing and performance benchmark suite for all new microservices.
carriedOver.carryOverReason: Deprioritized in favor of core API development; will resume once Order Management API reaches 80% completion.
